texto: I secretly enjoy being alone - hiking alone, skiing alone, walking along the beach alone, going to movies alone. Do not get me wrong, I like sharing my life with other people, but sometimes I really enjoy being as alone as possible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Josh Zuckerman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I secretly enjoy being alone - hiking alone, skiing alone, walking along the beach alone, going t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, alone, beach pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de alone e beach.
